title: abutilon greveanum
intro: Abutilon greveanum, also known as Madagascar thornapple, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. Traditionally used in Madagascar for its medicinal properties, the plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Abutilon greveanum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a tea or used in herbal remedies, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
